Title: Data Engineer (Mid-level) (m/w/d)
Description:
Company Description Haensel AMS—Advanced Mathematical Solutions—is a technology and data analytics boutique specializing in innovative machine learning and big data solutions. The company leverages advanced mathematical methods to design tailored data-driven strategies that address the specific needs of each client. Working closely with partners across industries, Haensel AMS turns complex data into actionable insights and measurable value. Team members collaborate in an environment that combines technical excellence, analytical rigor, and practical business impact. This setting offers professionals the opportunity to work on challenging projects with modern technologies and methods.




Role Description As a Mid-level Data Engineer at Haensel AMS, you will design, build, and maintain data pipelines that support advanced analytics and machine learning use cases. In close collaboration with data scientists and analysts, you will develop scalable ETL processes, integrate data from multiple sources, and ensure data is clean, reliable, and well-structured. You will contribute to data modeling and data warehouse design, optimize performance, and monitor data quality in production environments. Your work will include documenting data flows, automating workflows, and supporting stakeholders with data access and tooling. This is a full-time, on-site role based in Berlin, Germany.




Qualifications

Strong data engineering skills, including experience with Data Engineering concepts and building robust data pipelines.
Proficiency in Data Modeling and designing scalable data architectures to support analytics and reporting needs.
Hands-on experience with Extract Transform Load (ETL) processes and tools to integrate and transform data from diverse sources.
Knowledge of Data Warehousing concepts and implementation, including schema design and performance optimization.
Ability to apply Data Analytics techniques to validate, profile, and interpret data for business and technical stakeholders.
Proficiency in at least one programming language commonly used in data engineering (e.g., Python, Scala, or Java) and SQL.
Experience with modern data platforms or cloud ecosystems (e.g., AWS, GCP, or Azure) and related services is beneficial.
Familiarity with workflow orchestration, version control, and CI/CD practices for data solutions is an advantage.
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
Strong problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and the ability to work collaboratively in a cross-functional, inclusive team.

Title: Initiative Application
Description:
Empower every employee.

Our mission is to be the world's most used AI employee experience platform by changing the way frontline employees work.

Flip is the leading AI-powered employee experience platform for frontline workers. We're transforming how the people who keep the world running — in retail, manufacturing, and logistics — do their jobs. One app. One touch. Everything they need.

Our mission: Connect every employee to everything they need in one touch.

You appreciate flat hierarchies, short decision-making paths and live the hands-on mentality? You want to actively shape our journey instead of just being part of it and want to help shape Flip's vision?

Then we should get to know each other!

Apply on your own initiative and let us know in which area you would like to contribute your talents.

Let our employees convince you: https://www.kununu.com/de/flip-app/kommentare

What we offer you


Work mode: We're remote-first, giving you flexibility to work from home. At the same time, we deeply value the power of in-person collaboration. Depending on the role, you'll join occasional team events, workshops, or meetings in our Berlin or Stuttgart offices - always with plenty of notice. The exact balance will be discussed during your interview.
Work-Life-Balance: We don't want you to grow roots to your desk chair. That's why we cover the costs of your E-Gym-Wellpass membership and offer job bike leasing.
Celebrating success: Expect highly motivated and committed people in a relaxed working atmosphere.
Be part of something bigger: You actively shape Flip in your role. Along the way, you are an enabler of the rapid growth process of a young tech company and grow towards your goals, fun is guaranteed.
Happy to be a Flipster: Stay tuned for regular team events and culture days that bring us together as Flipsters.
Working abroad: At Flip you can also work abroad in the European Union. Let's talk about remote work in the interview.


At Flip, everyone is welcome - no matter what gender you identify as or how old you are. Sexual identity, origin, religion, world view and disabilities do not influence your potential job at Flip. The most important thing is that YOU fit in!

Title: Junior Data Engineer (m/f/d) - Martech
Description:
We are home24, the leading home & living e-commerce platform in continental Europe. We are currently active in seven countries. Over 1,000 Homies work together towards a common goal: to create happy homes for everyone and every budget.

How can we reach this goal? With an assortment of over 250,000 pieces of furniture and accessories from more than 1,000 suppliers, we offer the perfect addition to any living space combined with the comfort of being able to shop from anywhere.

What makes us proud to be Homies? We are pioneers in our market who seamlessly combine technology and creativity. We utilize data to provide personalized recommendations, tips and inspiration for every home.

At home24, we strive to deliver a superior assortment of products and the best service. To do this, we need fresh ideas, 100% motivation, and dedication to our company mission. We always have a space at our table for service-minded individuals who are passionate about digitization and modern living.

Our Marketing Technology (“Martech”) team is creating data-driven solutions that revolutionize and facilitate how Marketing & CRM operate enabling real-time personalization, campaign performance optimization, and marketing attribution. This involves data feeds, business insights, customer analytics, and machine learning models, along with other data products pushing marketing performance and automation.

For our headquarter in Berlin Prenzlauer-Berg we are looking to have you on-board as our new

Junior Data Engineer (m/f/d) - Martech

Your Responsibilities


You contribute to the design, implementation, and maintenance of batch and streaming data pipelines
You work with the product manager and other data engineers to enhance our AWS-based data platform adopting functional programming best practices and utilizing Apache Spark
You support data scientists and marketing stakeholders in operationalizing and scaling machine learning models that leverage our data
You build analytical workflows (e.g. customized user experiences, personalisation, automated A/B testing) using SQL, Scala, and Python
You contribute to data quality validation, and monitoring solutions to ensure reliability and trust in our data products
You take part in implementing POCs that bring data and business users closer


Your Profile

If you're interested in the role, but don't meet every requirement, we still encourage you to apply. We value a willingness to learn and grow with us. Tell us why you’re the right person in your application.


You hold a university degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, or a similar field
You have solid programming skills in Python and a JVM-based language like Scala
You are fluent in SQL, and familiarity with Apache Spark is a plus
You are familiar with concepts of modern data lake architecture and the fundamentals of Data Engineering
You have experience with AWS or any other cloud provider (preferred)
You are fluent in English


What We Offer You

Your impact


You will work closely with experienced data engineers and receive mentorship while gradually taking ownership of components within our data platform and Martech ecosystem
You will contribute to a modern technology stack and help drive openness to innovations


Your path


Hybrid working model: you have the flexibility to work from home on Wednesdays and Fridays in our standard working mode. We are in the office together Mondays, Tuesdays and Thursdays
The possibility to work up to two months per year within Germany or from an EU country
Up to 30 days paid vacation each year to unwind and recharge
City mobility with a subsidized public transportation ticket and our eco-friendly bike leasing program #ridinghome


Your second home


International campus in the heart of Berlin featuring drive-in bicycle garage, outdoor space and lounge areas, fitness facilities, parent and multi-faith rooms close to the Berlin S-Bahn train station Landsberger Allee
Company benefits including a pension scheme, 30 % off the home24 assortment, and employee discounts at partner organizations
You want to learn more about our home24 company culture and what it is like to be a homie? Follow @teamhome24 on Instagram


If you want to become part of a thrilling success story – we are looking forward to your application. Please send us your application together with your salary expectations and the earliest possible starting date via our career site.

Your home is surely filled with furniture of varying materials and styles. The same is true for home24 as an employer. We celebrate the diversity of the people who work with us. Be who you are and feel welcome to #makeyourselfathome24

You can find all job offers on our career site !

home24 SE | Otto-Ostrowski-Straße 3 | 10249 Berlin | Contact: Nadine Scharf

Title: Web Analyst (m/f/d) - Marketing & Data
Description:
We are home24, one of the leading home & living e-commerce platforms in continental Europe. We utilize data to provide personalized recommendations, tips, and inspiration for every home. We are looking for a Web Analyst (m/f/d) to join our team. In this role, you will support our marketing teams by ensuring data quality, maintaining our tracking setup, and delivering actionable insights through data visualization.

Your Responsibilities


You drive the implementation and maintenance of tracking concepts in GA4 and sGTM, refining event structures and debugging discrepancies to ensure delivery of high-quality data e.g. for attribution modeling and the design and evaluation of A/B tests
You evaluate the performance of marketing campaigns across various channels
You don't just deliver numbers, but interpret data to help the team understand trends and optimize ROI
You build and maintain interactive dashboards (e.g., in Tableau or Looker) to monitor key marketing metrics, translating business requirements into clear visualizations
You look beyond standard KPIs to investigate the "why" behind the data, conducting ad-hoc deep dives to uncover the root causes of performance shifts and user behavior
You act as a contact person for analytical questions regarding GA4, helping stakeholders understand their data usage needs
You monitor the data flow to ensure accuracy and support the team in identifying and fixing bugs in the tracking landscape


Your Profile


You have professional experience in web analytics, data analysis, or a related field, ideally within an e-commerce environment
You have hands-on experience with Google Analytics 4 (GA4) and (server-side) Google Tag Manager (sGTM)
You are proficient in SQL, capable of merging and transforming large-scale datasets from diverse sources. Proficiency in Python is a strong plus for building scalable data solutions
You have a basic understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to comprehend how tracking is implemented

Your impact

An open-minded culture ready to incorporate new and creative ideas


Your growth


Extensive learning opportunities from our home24 academy and external partners
Room for growth and development within your role through regular feedback rounds


Your path


Hybrid working model: you have the flexibility to work from home on Wednesdays and Fridays in our standard working mode. We are in the office together Mondays, Tuesdays and Thursdays
The possibility to work up to two months per year within Germany or from an EU country
Up to 30 days paid vacation each year to unwind and recharge
City mobility with a subsidized public transportation ticket and our eco-friendly bike leasing program #ridinghome


Your second home


International campus in the heart of Berlin featuring drive-in bicycle garage, outdoor space and lounge areas, fitness facilities, parent and multi-faith rooms close to the Berlin S-Bahn train station Landsberger Allee
Company benefits including a pension scheme, 30 % off the home24 assortment, and employee discounts at partner organizations

Title: Werkstudent*in Data & AI in Commercial Effectiveness
Description:
Für unser Team Commercial Effectiveness am Standort Berlin (Nähe Park Gleisdreieck) suchen wir einen Werkstudierenden (all genders) für 15-20h/Woche. Du unterstützt uns bei der Optimierung von Vertriebsstrategien, Datenanalysen und dem Einsatz von KI-Tools in einem globalen Pharmaunternehmen.

Deine Aufgaben


Analyse von Vertriebs- und Marktdaten, Erstellung von Reports & Dashboards
Einsatz und Evaluierung von LLM-Tools (z. B. ChatGPT, Copilot) für Business Use Cases
Automatisierung von Geschäftsprozessen mit Microsoft Power Automate
Unterstützung bei Territory-Alignment-Projekten und KPI-Auswertungen
Mitarbeit an Prototypen und Proof-of-Concepts für datengetriebene Lösungen
Identifikation von Automatisierungspotenzialen und Entwicklung von Workflows


Dein Profil


Immatrikuliert in BWL, Wirtschaftsinformatik, Gesundheitsökonomie o. Ä.
Du denkst analytisch und gehst eigenständig und strukturiert an Aufgaben heran
Du arbeitest gerne im Team und kommunizierst klar und auf den Punkt
Du kannst komplexe Inhalte einfach und verständlich erklären


Folgende Interessen und Kenntnisse bringst du mit


Sehr gute MS-Office-Kenntnisse (Excel, PowerPoint, Power Query), erste Erfahrung mit BI-Tools (Power BI, Tableau) und SQL
Interesse an AI/LLMs und Prozessautomatisierung
Deutschkenntnisse C1/C2 und Englischkenntnisse B2+


Wir bieten


Flexible Arbeitszeiten & teilweise mobiles Arbeiten
Modernes, internationales Arbeitsumfeld
Zugang zu Lernplattformen & strukturierte Einarbeitung


Wir freuen uns auf Deine Bewerbung. Bitte richte diese ausschließlich elektronisch an unseren Partner Provadis Professionals GmbH unter Werkstudent*in Data & AI in Commercial Effectiveness

Title: Analytics Engineer
Description:
About Gemma Analytics

At Gemma, we help organizations activate and operationalize their data using state-of-the-art technology. With our two verticals, GEM.AI for applied AI and GEM.BI for modern business intelligence, we enable clients to make better choices and take full ownership of their data.

We are service-driven at our core, focused on delivering practical, high-quality solutions that create long-term impact. You can read more about our data philosophy here.

Our clients range from Series A ventures to established SMEs, with company sizes spanning from 30 to over 13,000 employees. Across every engagement, we prioritize honesty, clarity, and a genuinely enjoyable working relationship.

About The Job

As an Analytics Engineer at Gemma, you play a critical role in helping our clients generate meaningful business value from their existing data. You transform raw information into clear, reliable insights by identifying patterns, uncovering opportunities, and enabling data-driven decision-making. By collaborating closely with clients, you help translate real-world challenges into practical, well-designed analytical solutions. During your first months, you will be supported by experienced team members to ensure a smooth onboarding and strong technical foundation.

You will work on complex, high-impact analytical problems across a diverse range of startups and SMEs, contributing directly to their ability to make informed, strategic decisions.

Responsibilities:


As we are tooling-agnostic, you will touch multiple technologies and understand the in’s & out’s what is currently possible in the data landscape
Collaborate and connect with domain experts to solve data obstacles in various industries
Develop advanced data reporting and visualizations
Leverage AI tools (e.g., LLM-assisted analytics, AI-augmented workflows) to accelerate delivery for clients and internally
Apply data modeling methodologies and contribute to a robust data platform for our clients


Who You Are

We believe in a good mixture of experience and upside in our team. We are looking for both types of people equally. For this mid-level role, we are looking for people with initial experience, and also with curiosity, openness to learning, and a structured mindset who are enthusiastic to solve numerical riddles while keeping in mind the business context.

Besides that, we are looking for the following:


Experience with SQL and relational databases
Business Fluency (C2 or native) in German and English
Good understanding of data modeling techniques (e.g. Data Vault or Kimball’s Dimensional Modelling) and data warehousing in general
Exposure to AI tools in a professional context (e.g., using LLMs to assist with documentation, code, or analysis)
Curiosity, a growth mindset, and comfort working in ambiguity
Bonus:
Experience with one or more programming languages (Python preferred)
Experience with one or more data visualization tools
Experience with managing stakeholders and/or clients

Gemma Perks

We are located in Berlin, close to Nordbahnhof. We are currently 18 colleagues and will grow to 24 colleagues in 2026. Other perks include


We have an honest, inclusive work environment and want to nurture this environment
We have frequent team events in Berlin: our cultural base
We encourage workations and even do workations as a company - it is up to you to come to the office between two and five days a week
We don’t compromise on equipment - a powerful Laptop, extra screens, and all the tools you need to be effective
We will surround you with great people who love to solve (mostly data) riddles
We believe in efficient working hours rather than long working hours - we focus on the output rather than the input
We learn and share during meetups, lunch & learn sessions and are open for further initiatives
We pay a market-friendly salary and we additionally distribute at least 20% of profits to our employees
We are fast-growing, have technology at our core, yet we do not rely on a VC and operate profitably
We have a great yearly offsite event that brings us all together for a full week, enjoying good food, having a good time, and of course, solving complex data-related tasks solving complex data-related tasks


How You'll Get Here


CV Screening
Initial Conversation
Hiring Test @home
Interviews with 2-3 future colleagues
Reference calls
Offer + Hired


About Us

We are Gemma Analytics: a Berlin-based company specialized in generating insights in a high-performance data infrastructure. Gemma was founded in early 2020 by two data enthusiasts. Ever since we have helped over 50 companies becoming more data-driven and successful. We have a fun, honest, and inclusive work environment. We are always looking for data-minded people we can learn from.

Title: Data Scientist
Description:
This isn’t your regular job. Almedia is a place where those who want to push harder can accelerate their careers faster than anywhere else. We’re aiming to become Germany’s second bootstrapped unicorn. Almedia is already Europe’s #3 fastest-growing company in 2025 (FT1000).

We are building the future of marketing by rewarding our community of over 70 million users for engaging with our advertisers’ products. We are offering a new way to acquire users for the biggest companies in the world.

Data Scientist

The Role

We Are Looking For Versatile Data Scientists To Join Us At a Pivotal Stage Of Growth. We Don’t Believe In a "one-size-fits-all" Data Profile. We Value Diverse Technical Lenses—whether You Are Someone Who


thrives on topics like causal inference, measurement expertise, experimental design, or builder of business logic with a rigorous mathematical backbone who scales data products,
zero-to-one specialist who loves the ambiguity of turning a raw idea into a revenue-generating system.


These are some example traits that we are looking for in candidates, beyond your typical data science tasks.

You will be part of a team that prizes "AI-First" thinking and building. We want people who love to debug a problem deeply once, if you have to debug it twice, it’s time to automate it. We strive for high standards but remain focused on business outcomes. Every model or dashboard must have a clear "so what?"

What You Might Work On

Depending on your seniority, experience or specialisation, your impact may involve some (but not all) of the following:


Designing ML models that power real-time recSys, ranking and pricing algorithms, optimising for engagement and conversion within our gaming ecosystem.
Building reward structures and user-incentive systems that balance user motivation with sustainable ROAS through uplift modelling and pricing optimisation.
Leading complex experimentation iterations in data driven verticals, product or user acquisition, including causal impact estimation or measurement strategies such as MMM and Multi-Touch Attribution.
Zero to one projects, taking a blank slate in a unexplored domain and turning it into a production-ready data product, from initial data structures to final deployment.
Partnering with engineering to refine and develop our stack and system architecture and establishing "gold standard" documentation.


What We’re Looking For


Strong experience building and deploying machine learning models in a product-driven environment, ideally in Gaming, AdTech, gambling or user-incentive systems.
Robust experience of data engineering workflows and modern data stack tools (e.g DBT, Airflow, K8s, Terraform).
Proficiency in Python and SQL; experience with cloud platforms (GCP preferred)
Excellent communication and leadership skills, with the ability to drive clarity, create structure, and bring stakeholders on board.


We believe in fostering talent, evaluating all skill levels during the hiring process, and providing a clear path for growth. Almedia is an equal opportunity employer. We embrace and celebrate diversity, and encourage individuals from all backgrounds to apply.

Title: Big Data Analyst
Description:
YOUR FUTURE, ON DEMAND




The ideal blend of stability and flexibility. A genuinely human employer that cares for people and the planet. True autonomy to shape what comes next, for us and you. This is the perfect platform to take your career where you want.




Back in 2005, we pioneered Europe’s first TV streaming service. Today, we’re the world’s first certified climate neutral TV streaming provider. Several million users across three countries. Over 230 colleagues of 47 nationalities. We’re the grown-up start-up, helping to shape a better future since day one. That hasn’t changed, even if the world has. We’re friendly, international, inclusive – and our people say we’re reliable and transparent, too. It’s why they trust us and believe in what we do.




THE ROLE




We are looking for a Data Analyst to join Zattoo's BI Team following an internal transition. This is not a typical dashboard-producer role. We want someone who combines deep technical craft — writing production-grade SQL, building DBT models, orchestrating pipelines — with the commercial instinct to turn raw data into decisions. We are also actively exploring how AI and LLM tooling can augment the way we work, and we want someone genuinely curious about that space.




This role sits at the intersection of Data Engineering and Business Analysis. You will own analytical products end-to-end: from schema design and DBT model authorship, through to stakeholder presentations and strategic recommendations - without needing to hand off at either end.




THE TEAM




You'll join a compact BI team of four analysts, reporting to the Head of Business Intelligence. We operate across Zattoo's DE, CH, and AT markets, supporting product, commercial, and executive stakeholders. We process 6 TB of event data daily and are mid-way through a migration from a legacy Vertica/Jenkins stack to a modern GCP architecture (BigQuery, Airflow, dbt). There is real scope to shape how we do things - this is not a maintenance role.


WHAT YOU’LL DO



Own analytical domains end-to-end: Design and maintain DBT models, write production SQL in BigQuery, and deliver finished insight - not raw data - to stakeholders.


Proactively generate business insight: Go beyond answering questions. Identify trends, anomalies, and opportunities autonomously and bring them to the relevant team before they ask.


Build and maintain Tableau dashboards: Design decision-oriented dashboards tuned for product, commercial, and executive audiences - including external-facing B2B analytics.


Collaborate on the data stack: Work closely with Data Engineers on Airflow pipelines, schema evolution, data quality and governance. You should be comfortable reading and contributing to pipeline code.


Partner with stakeholders: Translate ambiguous business questions into analytical frameworks. Run working sessions, present findings, and advocate for data-informed decisions at all levels.


Support A/B testing and experimentation: Design test setups, validate statistical significance, and communicate results as clear product recommendations.


Champion data quality: Own data dictionaries, documentation, and DBT tests for your domains. Raise quality issues proactively.



WHAT YOU’LL BRING



4+ years of experience as a Data or Analytics Engineer in a digital or tech product company


Expert-level SQL - you write complex, optimised queries without looking things up


Hands-on experience with BigQuery as a primary data warehouse


Practical experience with DBT - writing models, tests, documentation, and understanding lineage


Experience building and scheduling data pipelines with Apache Airflow


Strong Tableau skills - you build dashboards that drive decisions, not just display numbers


Strong communication: you can present analytical findings to a CFO and pair-program with an engineer on the same day


Familiarity with Mixpanel, mParticle, or similar product analytics tools


Comfort working in ambiguity - you can scope and prioritise your own analytical work



Nice to Have



Experience with ClickHouse


Python for data manipulation or automation (pandas, scripts, notebooks)


Background in OTT, media, or subscription businesses


Experience with A/B testing platforms (Optimizely, etc.)



AI & Emerging Tools — Openness to Learn



Hands-on exposure to LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, etc.) — e.g. building classification, tagging, or summarisation pipelines on top of text data


Familiarity with agentic frameworks or workflow automation tools (LangChain, n8n, Airflow with LLM steps, or similar)


Regular use of AI-assisted development tools such as Cursor or GitHub Copilot in day-to-day coding


Curiosity about applying AI to BI workflows: auto-commentary on KPI movements, semantic search over data catalogs, or similar





WHY JOIN US?




At Zattoo, you’re always on firm ground with real freedom to explore. You’ll have the support and opportunity you need to go far, while you’re helping us create a sustainable and entertainment-filled future for all.


WHAT WE OFFER YOU



Reward: strong market competitive salary


Recharge: 30 days vacation plus public holidays


Regulate: trust based flexible working hours and the option for remote work worldwide for up to 8 weeks per year



Plus:



We’re sharing: Free access to the best streaming experience on the market


We're developing: Your own development budget, German classes and Zattoo all-company hack days


**We’re inclusive: ‘**Zattooies’ are a fun, engaged, and diverse team made up of 47 nationalities


We’re healthy: Health checks, mental wellbeing support, team sports and more!


We’re responsible: We are carbon neutral, an active employee Green team, discounted BVG tickets and free bike rentals


We’re sociable: A calendar of events with fireside chats, lunches, in-house bar, BBQ’s, monthly socials, summer party and an annual off-site event





Zattoo enables our users to view indiscriminately and we reflect that in our team too. Regardless of race, gender, sexual orientation, religion, national origin, age, disability or any other characteristic protected by law we encourage everyone to apply and will give everyone equal consideration. We are an equal opportunities employer, join us and help build a diverse team dedicated to the future of TV.

Show more
HTML:
YOUR FUTURE, ON DEMAND


The ideal blend of stability and flexibility. A genuinely human employer that cares for people and the planet. True autonomy to shape what comes next, for us and you. This is the perfect platform to take your career where you want.


Back in 2005, we pioneered Europe’s first TV streaming service. Today, we’re the world’s first certified climate neutral TV streaming provider. Several million users across three countries. Over 230 colleagues of 47 nationalities. We’re the grown-up start-up, helping to shape a better future since day one. That hasn’t changed, even if the world has. We’re friendly, international, inclusive – and our people say we’re reliable and transparent, too. It’s why they trust us and believe in what we do.


THE ROLE


We are looking for a Data Analyst to join Zattoo's BI Team following an internal transition. This is not a typical dashboard-producer role. We want someone who combines deep technical craft — writing production-grade SQL, building DBT models, orchestrating pipelines — with the commercial instinct to turn raw data into decisions. We are also actively exploring how AI and LLM tooling can augment the way we work, and we want someone genuinely curious about that space.


This role sits at the intersection of Data Engineering and Business Analysis. You will own analytical products end-to-end: from schema design and DBT model authorship, through to stakeholder presentations and strategic recommendations - without needing to hand off at either end.


THE TEAM


You'll join a compact BI team of four analysts, reporting to the Head of Business Intelligence. We operate across Zattoo's DE, CH, and AT markets, supporting product, commercial, and executive stakeholders. We process 6 TB of event data daily and are mid-way through a migration from a legacy Vertica/Jenkins stack to a modern GCP architecture (BigQuery, Airflow, dbt). There is real scope to shape how we do things - this is not a maintenance role.


WHAT YOU’LL DO

  • Own analytical domains end-to-end: Design and maintain DBT models, write production SQL in BigQuery, and deliver finished insight - not raw data - to stakeholders.

  • Proactively generate business insight: Go beyond answering questions. Identify trends, anomalies, and opportunities autonomously and bring them to the relevant team before they ask.

  • Build and maintain Tableau dashboards: Design decision-oriented dashboards tuned for product, commercial, and executive audiences - including external-facing B2B analytics.

  • Collaborate on the data stack: Work closely with Data Engineers on Airflow pipelines, schema evolution, data quality and governance. You should be comfortable reading and contributing to pipeline code.

  • Partner with stakeholders: Translate ambiguous business questions into analytical frameworks. Run working sessions, present findings, and advocate for data-informed decisions at all levels.

  • Support A/B testing and experimentation: Design test setups, validate statistical significance, and communicate results as clear product recommendations.

  • Champion data quality: Own data dictionaries, documentation, and DBT tests for your domains. Raise quality issues proactively.


WHAT YOU’LL BRING

  • 4+ years of experience as a Data or Analytics Engineer in a digital or tech product company

  • Expert-level SQL - you write complex, optimised queries without looking things up

  • Hands-on experience with BigQuery as a primary data warehouse

  • Practical experience with DBT - writing models, tests, documentation, and understanding lineage

  • Experience building and scheduling data pipelines with Apache Airflow

  • Strong Tableau skills - you build dashboards that drive decisions, not just display numbers

  • Strong communication: you can present analytical findings to a CFO and pair-program with an engineer on the same day

  • Familiarity with Mixpanel, mParticle, or similar product analytics tools

  • Comfort working in ambiguity - you can scope and prioritise your own analytical work


Nice to Have

  • Experience with ClickHouse

  • Python for data manipulation or automation (pandas, scripts, notebooks)

  • Background in OTT, media, or subscription businesses

  • Experience with A/B testing platforms (Optimizely, etc.)


AI & Emerging Tools — Openness to Learn

  • Hands-on exposure to LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, etc.) — e.g. building classification, tagging, or summarisation pipelines on top of text data

  • Familiarity with agentic frameworks or workflow automation tools (LangChain, n8n, Airflow with LLM steps, or similar)

  • Regular use of AI-assisted development tools such as Cursor or GitHub Copilot in day-to-day coding

  • Curiosity about applying AI to BI workflows: auto-commentary on KPI movements, semantic search over data catalogs, or similar


WHY JOIN US?


At Zattoo, you’re always on firm ground with real freedom to explore. You’ll have the support and opportunity you need to go far, while you’re helping us create a sustainable and entertainment-filled future for all.


WHAT WE OFFER YOU

  • Reward: strong market competitive salary

  • Recharge: 30 days vacation plus public holidays

  • Regulate: trust based flexible working hours and the option for remote work worldwide for up to 8 weeks per year


Plus:

  • We’re sharing: Free access to the best streaming experience on the market

  • We're developing: Your own development budget, German classes and Zattoo all-company hack days

  • **We’re inclusive: ‘**Zattooies’ are a fun, engaged, and diverse team made up of 47 nationalities

  • We’re healthy: Health checks, mental wellbeing support, team sports and more!

  • We’re responsible: We are carbon neutral, an active employee Green team, discounted BVG tickets and free bike rentals

  • We’re sociable: A calendar of events with fireside chats, lunches, in-house bar, BBQ’s, monthly socials, summer party and an annual off-site event


Zattoo enables our users to view indiscriminately and we reflect that in our team too. Regardless of race, gender, sexual orientation, religion, national origin, age, disability or any other characteristic protected by law we encourage everyone to apply and will give everyone equal consideration. We are an equal opportunities employer, join us and help build a diverse team dedicated to the future of TV.

Title: Data Analyst (m/w/d)
Description:
Ihre guten Ideen finden endlich Gehör! Wir sind der Motor für eine schnelle und pragmatische Umsetzung zum Wohle unserer Patient:innen.

Zur Verstärkung unseres Teams Business Intelligence der Helios Kliniken suchen wir bundesweit zum nächstmöglichen Zeitpunkt Sie als

Data Analyst (m/w/d)

in Vollzeit mit Dienstsitz in Berlin und der Möglichkeit zum mobilen arbeiten.

Das erwartet Sie



Spannende und abwechslungsreiche Aufgaben in der Analyse, Aufbereitung und Visualisierung komplexer Daten aus dem Gesundheitswesen
Entwicklung und Pflege von Datenmodellen, Machine-Learning-Modellen sowie automatisierten Auswertungen zur Unterstützung datenbasierter Entscheidungen
Visualisierung von Daten, um Trends, Muster und Optimierungspotenziale zu identifizieren
Enge Zusammenarbeit mit Entscheidungsträgern zur Erarbeitung datenbasierter Handlungsempfehlungen und strategischer Empfehlungen
Mitwirkung bei der Definition und Weiterentwicklung von KPIs und Reporting-Standards



Das bringen Sie mit



Abgeschlossenes Studium im Bereich Wirtschaftsinformatik, Informatik, Statistik, Mathematik, BWL oder eine vergleichbare Qualifikation
Sehr gute Kenntnisse in Power BI, insbesondere im Umgang mit DAX und Power Query zur Erstellung komplexer Auswertungen und Dashboards
Fundierte Kenntnisse in Python und SQL für Datenanalysen, Automatisierungen und Datenmodellierung (z.B. mit Pandas, NumPy, SQL Server, dbt, etc.)
Stark ausgeprägte analytisch-konzeptionelle Fähigkeiten zur strukturierten Analyse großer Datenmengen und zur Ableitung relevanter Erkenntnisse sowie ein Grundverständnis betriebswirtschaftlicher Zusammenhänge, idealerweise im klinischen Kontext
Sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift (mind. C1) sind Voraussetzung, genau wie eine hohe Eigeninitiative, Motivation und ein hohes Maß an Qualitätsbewusstsein
Kenntnisse im Bereich Medizincontrolling, Gesundheitswesen oder Krankenhaus-Controlling sind von Vorteil
Gesetzlich notwendiger Nachweis über Immunisierung gegen Masern



Freuen Sie sich auf



Ein kollegiales, offenes und hilfsbereites Team, das gemeinsam an innovativen Lösungen arbeitet
Ein modernes Arbeitskonzept mit der Möglichkeit zum mobilen Arbeiten und flexiblen Arbeitszeiten für eine gute Vereinbarkeit von Beruf und Privatleben
Ein hoher Grad an Selbstbestimmung und Eigenverantwortung mit Raum für eigene Ideen und Gestaltungsmöglichkeiten
Ein modernes, datengetriebenes Arbeitsumfeld mit kurzen Entscheidungswegen und klaren Hierarchien
Die Helios PlusCard: Eine durch Helios finanzierte Zusatzversicherung mit u. a. Wahlarztbehandlung bzw. Wahlärztinbehandlung im Falle eines Krankenhausaufenthalts in einer unserer Kliniken – bei Interesse für die ganze Familie
Rabatte für über 480 Topmarken und Präventionsprogramme, z.B. Vergünstigungen bei Sportstudios
Wir bieten Ihnen die Chance, umweltfreundlich zur Arbeit zu kommen – mit einem Arbeitgeberzuschuss zum Deutschlandticket



Jetzt liegt es nur noch an Ihnen!

Kontakt

Helios ist der führende Klinikträger in Europa. Die kollegiale und fachübergreifende Zusammenarbeit und die schnelle Umsetzung von Innovationen garantieren unseren Patient:innen eine bestmögliche Versorgung. Auf diese Weise entsteht ein einzigartiger Raum für Ihre Kenntnisse, Talente, Ideen und Zukunftspläne.

Ihre neue Arbeitsstelle ist nur ein paar Klicks entfernt - bewerben Sie sich hier! Wir freuen uns auf Ihre Bewerbung.

Bitte senden Sie uns Ihre vollständigen Bewerbungsunterlagen unter Angabe



Ihres gewünschten Eintrittstermins und
Ihrer Gehaltsvorstellung



online über unser Bewerbungsportal. Bitte beachten Sie, dass nur vollständige Bewerbungsunterlagen für den Bewerbungsprozess berücksichtigt werden können. Vielen Dank.

Chancengleichheit im Beruf ist uns wichtig. Deshalb ermutigen wir insbesondere Menschen mit Behinderung, jeglicher geschlechtlichen Identität und Herkunft sich zu bewerben.

Für nähere Auskünfte zur Position steht Ihnen unser Head of Business Intelligence, Herr Pablo Kurtscheidt, gern per E-Mail unter Pablo.Kurtscheidt[at]helios-health.com zur Verfügung.

Title: Data Engineer (Mid-level) (m/w/d)
Description:
Company Description Haensel AMS—Advanced Mathematical Solutions—is a technology and data analytics boutique specializing in innovative machine learning and big data solutions. The company leverages advanced mathematical methods to design tailored data-driven strategies that address the specific needs of each client. Working closely with partners across industries, Haensel AMS turns complex data into actionable insights and measurable value. Team members collaborate in an environment that combines technical excellence, analytical rigor, and practical business impact. This setting offers professionals the opportunity to work on challenging projects with modern technologies and methods.




Role Description As a Mid-level Data Engineer at Haensel AMS, you will design, build, and maintain data pipelines that support advanced analytics and machine learning use cases. In close collaboration with data scientists and analysts, you will develop scalable ETL processes, integrate data from multiple sources, and ensure data is clean, reliable, and well-structured. You will contribute to data modeling and data warehouse design, optimize performance, and monitor data quality in production environments. Your work will include documenting data flows, automating workflows, and supporting stakeholders with data access and tooling. This is a full-time, on-site role based in Berlin, Germany.




Qualifications

Strong data engineering skills, including experience with Data Engineering concepts and building robust data pipelines.
Proficiency in Data Modeling and designing scalable data architectures to support analytics and reporting needs.
Hands-on experience with Extract Transform Load (ETL) processes and tools to integrate and transform data from diverse sources.
Knowledge of Data Warehousing concepts and implementation, including schema design and performance optimization.
Ability to apply Data Analytics techniques to validate, profile, and interpret data for business and technical stakeholders.
Proficiency in at least one programming language commonly used in data engineering (e.g., Python, Scala, or Java) and SQL.
Experience with modern data platforms or cloud ecosystems (e.g., AWS, GCP, or Azure) and related services is beneficial.
Familiarity with workflow orchestration, version control, and CI/CD practices for data solutions is an advantage.
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
Strong problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and the ability to work collaboratively in a cross-functional, inclusive team.

Title: Data Engineer/Analyst - Integration (m/w/d)
Description:
Do you want to give your talent meaning and have a positive impact on the world?

Founded In 2016, Padoa Today Brings Together Over 300 Passionate Employees Around a Software And Service Offering Designed To Modernize Occupational Health Care. More Than 8 Million Employees In France Are Already Supported Via Our SaaS Platform. Since The Beginning Of 2025, We Have Also Been Active In Germany With a Clear Mission

👉 To create a working world where prevention comes first—for the health and well-being of millions of people!

To continue our mission, we regularly seek new talent in the areas of Tech, Data, Product, Design, Business, and Strategy.

Responsibilities

As a Data Engineer / Analyst, you will be at the heart of our client onboarding process. You will join the Integration team, whose core mission is to ensure the complete and structured migration of data from our clients' legacy business software to padoa solutions.

Instead of traditional KPI reporting, your role is focused on pure business data transformation: moving data from source systems into our target database with high precision.

Key Missions


SQL Transformation: Map and transform legacy database structures into padoa-compatible SQL to ensure successful data injection.
Business Logic Application: Translate business requirements (related to leads, pricing, and practitioner data) into technical transformation rules.
Data Quality: Clean and uniformize incoming data to ensure high performance and reliability for our end users.
Team Collaboration: Work within a bi-national team, transitioning from French support towards full autonomy for the German market by 2027.


Profile


Experience: 1.5 to 3 years in a Data-centric role (Data Engineer, Analyst, or Solution Architect).
Technical Skills: Strong proficiency in SQL is mandatory. A focus on data mapping and business logic transformation.
Mindset: Highly organized, detail-oriented, and eager to learn the specifics of the German HealthTech market.
Languages: Fluent in German. Good command of English and/or French.


What You Will Find With Us

🚀 Modern Technical Environment: Current tech stack with over 50% of the team in tech roles.

🤝 Premium Positioning: Recognized and valued customer support.

🏡 Flexible Organization: Hybrid work (on-site and remote), 30 days of vacation.

🧑‍💻 Modern Offices: Located in Berlin, high-quality equipment, Bahncard 25, company phone, and laptop.

👋 Great Onboarding: Introduction to padoa, the teams, and the specifics of your role.

👣 Professional Development: An international and dynamic structure that encourages initiative and commitment at all levels.

🎉 Vibrant Culture: International collaboration, plenty of room for your own ideas, and short decision-making paths.

🦾 Inclusion & Diversity: A dedicated inclusion and disability policy with concrete measures.

Title: AI Engineer
Description:
Retire the ERP.

Light exists to replace factory-era ERPs with software that feels alive. Our Smart Financial Platform gives modern, global companies superpowers—automated accounting, real-time reporting, and financial flows that move at the speed of the business.

We build with our customers, ship fast, and obsess over craft. In a short time, Light has gone from idea to the operating core for leading companies like Lovable, Legora, and Keyshot. People don’t just use Light—they enjoy it.

We’re an early team defining a new software category. Think engineers who love debits and credits, designers who care about reconciliation states, and operators who treat finance as a product. If you’re excited to modernize how the world runs money—one workflow at a time—you’re in the right place.

Backed by world-class investors and advised by industry titans, we’re building category-defining products with the freedom to ship ambitiously and own outcomes.

Come help us make Light the global default for next-gen finance.

This AI Engineer role

We're looking for builders who can take a customer problem from idea to production, wherever in the stack it lives. At Light, AI writes code and the bottleneck has shifted from writing to thinking, so we want engineers who work end-to-end and ship things that matter.

We are primarily hiring at mid-level for this role. Junior candidates who are exceptional and genuinely AI-native are welcome. Senior candidates will be considered by exception; we have strong technical leadership and the bar is high.

Your qualifications:

2-6 years of experience ideally, plus...


You build things. Not prototypes, not demos. Working software in production, doing something real for real users. This is the non-negotiable.
You're genuinely AI-native. You've changed the way you work because of AI tooling, not just added it to your workflow. You have an instinct for where it helps, where it misleads, and how to use it without losing ownership of the outcome.
You've built with LLMs. You have hands-on experience building products or features on top of large language models. Agents are a bonus, but working knowledge of how LLMs behave in production is a must.
You're comfortable across the stack. You don't need to be a specialist in everything, but you can't have a lane you refuse to leave. Our stack is Kotlin and React. If you're strong in one and curious about the rest, that works. If you need someone else to handle the other side of the feature, it doesn't.
You care about the product. You think about the person on the other end. You notice when something feels clunky, even if it technically works. You have opinions about what good software feels like and you act on them.
You ship early and often. Small batches. Learn. Go again. You're not precious about your work. You'd rather put something real in front of a customer than spend another week perfecting it in isolation.


Bonus points:


Experience in fintech or systems where data integrity is non-negotiable
Familiarity with accounting concepts: debits, credits, reconciliation
Background in high-growth startups where everything was still being figured out


Our Tech Stack:

We build on AWS, with a Kotlin backend, a React frontend, and infrastructure managed in Terraform. It's a real production system that global finance teams depend on every day.

You don't need to have used every piece of it. You do need to be comfortable in this kind of environment: real scale, real customers, real stakes.

The good stuff

In addition to being part of a great team and working in a really fun and innovative environment, we offer:

💸 A competitive salary + potential stock options

🏝 25 days of annual leave + public holidays in the country where you are based.

🥳 Regular socials and company off-sites

🚀 A huge opportunity for career growth as you'll help shape a market-defining product.

The famous last words

Working at Light means you're embarking on an exciting journey to reshape the future of multinational financial operations. Our cheat-code is that we've built something like this before - and are now doing it again, only better. Our goal is to make global finance effortless and empower companies to make informed decisions.

Join the rocket ship while it's taking off 🚀


Show more

  • You've built with LLMs. You have hands-on experience building products or features on top of large language models. Agents are a bonus, but working knowledge of how LLMs behave in production is a must.
  • You're comfortable across the stack. You don't need to be a specialist in everything, but you can't have a lane you refuse to leave. Our stack is Kotlin and React. If you're strong in one and curious about the rest, that works. If you need someone else to handle the other side of the feature, it doesn't.
  • You care about the product. You think about the person on the other end. You notice when something feels clunky, even if it technically works. You have opinions about what good software feels like and you act on them.
  • You ship early and often. Small batches. Learn. Go again. You're not precious about your work. You'd rather put something real in front of a customer than spend another week perfecting it in isolation.

Bonus points:

  • Experience in fintech or systems where data integrity is non-negotiable
  • Familiarity with accounting concepts: debits, credits, reconciliation
  • Background in high-growth startups where everything was still being figured out

Our Tech Stack:

We build on AWS, with a Kotlin backend, a React frontend, and infrastructure managed in Terraform. It's a real production system that global finance teams depend on every day.

You don't need to have used every piece of it. You do need to be comfortable in this kind of environment: real scale, real customers, real stakes.

The good stuff

In addition to being part of a great team and working in a really fun and innovative environment, we offer:

💸 A competitive salary + potential stock options

🏝 25 days of annual leave + public holidays in the country where you are based.

🥳 Regular socials and company off-sites

🚀 A huge opportunity for career growth as you'll help shape a market-defining product.

The famous last words

Working at Light means you're embarking on an exciting journey to reshape the future of multinational financial operations. Our cheat-code is that we've built something like this before - and are now doing it again, only better. Our goal is to make global finance effortless and empower companies to make informed decisions.

Join the rocket ship while it's taking off 🚀

Title: Director of Data (BI & Analytics)
Description:
About The Company

The AI-driven trade platform transforming industrial supply in infrastructure, energy, and construction materials. It connects vetted suppliers across Asia, Europe, and the GCC region with local demand through a single integrated platform.

Its proprietary AI stack digitizes and automates the full lifecycle of materials trade – from procurement and pricing to inventory, logistics, and embedded financing – replacing thousands of manual, relationship-driven processes with real-time orchestration.

Buyers gain instant quotes, reliable availability, and predictable delivery through a unified operating system. Suppliers benefit from accurate forecasting, disciplined demand management, and seamless integration into cross-border fulfillment networks. The company partners with leading brands to run both dropship and cross-dock fulfillment motions for large-scale transactions, turning global supply chains into predictable, repeatable, software-like workflows.

The company has scaled to triple-digit-million GMV, operates across six international markets, and is rapidly expanding toward profitability. With a team of 80+ people across Berlin (HQ) and Asia, it is building the world’s first industrial-grade AI operating system for materials – redefining how global trade works in one of the world’s largest and most essential industries.

The company is backed by top-tier investors as well as global institutional banking partners, having recently closed its $40m series B - Atomico, Project A, and Invent Capital with institutional backing from Commerzbank and KfW.

About The Role

You will lead and further develop the Data functions, specifically the engine that turns raw operational signals into real-time intelligence for Sales, Operations, Procurement, and Finance.

This is not a back-office analytics role, it’s a front-line leadership role. You’ll own our data models, pipelines, and metrics - and develop AI-assisted systems that anticipate what happens next: which deal closes, which lane fails, which customer churns, which supplier delays, and how all our Agentic AI performs.

You’ll partner closely with Growth, Operations, and Product to turn data into a competitive advantage - running the daily rhythm of dashboards, forecasts, and decisions that move millions in GMV each week.

As part of our management leadership team, you will have a pathway to multi-region oversight, a highly competitive compensation package with performance-based incentives, and the opportunity to shape a high-performance organization from our Berlin headquarters, backed by top-tier investors.

Focus Areas


Build the data backbone: Own our warehouse, models, and BI stack (SQL etc.) and ensure single-source-of-truth visibility for every team.
Operationalise insights: Work directly with Sales and Ops leadership to translate signal into action, quota pacing, margin tracking, reactivation triggers, fulfillment risks.
Develop AI-assisted workflows: Collaborate with Tech to deploy GPT-based or agentic assistants for forecasting, pricing, and anomaly detection.
Elevate reporting: Move the company from descriptive to predictive, automate recurring reports, and power daily management decisions.
Own metrics: Define, implement, and track core KPIs across GMV, NRM, automation percentage and order quality.
Coach a small team of analysts: Hire, mentor, and scale an output-driven data team that combines speed with accuracy
Bridge teams: Integrate Data into the heartbeat of the business, Sales, Ops, Finance, Procurement, and Product all run off your dashboards.
Guarantee data quality: Clean pipelines, consistent definitions, zero ambiguity.


What Success Looks Like


100% alignment on KPI definitions across departments
Automated, self-updating dashboards for every business function.
Forecast accuracy >95%, margin reporting live by GMV, margin, and region.
One live AI-assisted data copilot embedded in Sales and Ops workflows within 3 months.
Significant reduction in manual reporting - ≥50% of recurring tasks automated.
Data stack clean, documented, and production-grade.
Weekly exec dashboards replacing static slide reports.


We are an equal-opportunity employer and welcome applicants from all backgrounds, regardless of race, ethnicity, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, religion, age, disability, or any other characteristic. We believe that diversity drives innovation, creativity, and collective strength.

Title: NGS Data Analyst for Molecular Oncology
Description:
Alacris Theranostics GmbH is a leader in innovative molecular diagnostics, specialising in personalised oncology. Our cutting-edge solutions combine next-generation sequencing (NGS), advanced bioinformatics, and systems biology to transform scientific insights into enhanced cancer diagnostics and more precise treatment decisions. We collaborate closely with leading research institutions, hospitals, and pharmaceutical partners to drive meaningful and lasting improvements in patient outcomes.


Tasks


We are seeking an experienced Bioinformatician / Computational Biologist with a strong track record in next-generation sequencing (NGS) data analysis. The successful candidate will be responsible for processing and analysing NGS datasets - including RNA-Seq, whole-exome sequencing (WES), whole-genome sequencing (WGS), and single-cell sequencing - derived from tumour samples.


Requirements


The ideal candidate will demonstrate excellent programming skills in R and Python, along with proven expertise in NGS data analysis and a solid foundation in human molecular genetics. Knowledge of statistics, high-dimensional data analysis, and cancer genomics is highly desirable.




We are looking for a candidate with a genuine interest in precision oncology, a proactive approach to learning, and a commitment to developing new skills. Strong motivation, a collaborative mindset, and excellent communication skills are essential


Benefits


You will join a multidisciplinary team of bioinformaticians, molecular biologists, and software engineers dedicated to developing innovative analysis pipelines and diagnostic solutions in oncology.




We offer a rewarding and challenging role within a dynamic biotech company based in the vibrant city of Berlin. The position comes with a competitive salary and a stimulating working environment. The appointment is available immediately and will initially be for a two-year term, with the possibility of extension.




How to Apply? Interested candidates should provide a CV, publication list, details of previous research and work experience, and contact details of three referees as a single PDF file, citing reference ALA-NGSA-0426.




The closing date for applications is April 15, 2026.

Title: IT - Helpdesk
Description:
Hallo! 👋 Du bist IT-affin, liebst es, Probleme direkt beim Anwender zu lösen und suchst einen Job mit echter Langzeitperspektive? Dann bist Du bei uns genau richtig!




Wir suchen einen engagierten IT-Supporter (all genders) für den direkten Einsatz bei unserem Kunden in der Region Berlin/Brandenburg.




Das Besondere an dieser Stelle: Wir bieten Dir ein extrem stabiles Projekt mit einer festen Laufzeit bis Februar 2026 und einer anschließenden Verlängerungsoption für 3 weitere Jahre, die als sehr sicher gilt! 🤝 Hier kannst Du wirklich ankommen und langfristig planen.


Aufgaben


Als zentraler Ansprechpartner (SPOC) bist Du das Gesicht der IT direkt beim Kunden.





👨‍💻 Ansprechpartner & Berater: Du bist die erste Anlaufstelle für alle IT-Themen und weist Anwender in neue Systeme, Laptops oder Mobilgeräte ein.


🖥️ Hardware-Management: Du kümmerst Dich um die Einrichtung, Konfiguration, Installation und den Austausch von IT-Arbeitsplätzen (Desktops, Notebooks, Drucker, Peripherie) sowie der Medientechnik in Konferenzräumen.


🔍 Troubleshooting: Als "Helping Hand" analysierst und behebst Du Hardware- und Softwarestörungen (MS Windows, Netzwerk etc.) direkt vor Ort.


📱 Mobile Devices: Du betreust mobile Geräte und übernimmst deren Einrichtung über MDM-Systeme (z.B. Intune).


📦 Rollouts & Logistik: Du unterstützt tatkräftig bei IT-Rollouts, IT-Umzügen und übernimmst die Lagerverwaltung (Ausgabe, Rücknahme) sowie die Pflege des Asset-Managements.


🎫 Ticket-Profi: Du bearbeitest, dokumentierst und verfolgst alle Anfragen strukturiert im Ticketsystem.



Qualifikation


Das bringst Du mit (Qualifikationen)




🎓 Deine Basis: Eine abgeschlossene Ausbildung im IT-Bereich (z.B. Fachinformatiker/in Systemintegration, IT-Systemkaufmann/-frau) ODER Du bist ein passionierter Quereinsteiger (all genders) mit nachweisbarer Berufserfahrung im IT-Support.





💡 Deine Erfahrung: Du konntest bereits wertvolle Erfahrung im direkten IT-User-Support (Vor-Ort-Service) sammeln.


🔧 Dein Know-how: Du hast gute Kenntnisse im Umgang mit Microsoft-Produkten (Active Directory, ENTRA ID, Berechtigungsvergabe) und bist routiniert im Umgang mit Ticketsystemen.


💻 Deine Skills: Troubleshooting von Desktops, Notebooks, mobilen Endgeräten und Medientechnik ist für Dich kein Problem.


⭐ Dein Plus: Du hast idealerweise bereits Erfahrung im Bereich Mobile Device Management (Intune)

Title: Founders Associate
Description:
Founders Associate (m/w/d)

Wir suchen einen Founders Associate (m/w/d) für unser dynamisches und wachsendes Single Family Office. Mit Scale Invest bauen wir das Family Office der neuen Generation. Alle Gewinne aus unseren Bereichen Real Estate, Ventures und Capital fließen zurück in das Startup Ökosystem. Du nimmst eine Schlüsselrolle in unserem Team ein und erhältst spannende Einblicke in Investments sowie Start- & Grown-ups.

Was erwartet Dich?


Du arbeitest eng mit unserem Investment-Team zusammen, um die Weiterentwicklung der Portfoliounternehmen voranzutreiben.
Du unterstützt die Gründerteams in unseren Portfolio-Unternehmen direkt bei strategischen und operativen Herausforderungen.
Du entwickelst und implementierst Wachstumsstrategien in enger Zusammenarbeit mit dem Management der Startups.
Du identifizierst und setzt neue Geschäftsmodelle, Marktchancen und Skalierungsansätze um.
Du analysierst Unternehmenskennzahlen und leitest Optimierungsmaßnahmen ab.
Du unterstützt bei Fundraising-Aktivitäten, im Business Development und bei der Marktexpansion.


Das Bringst Du Mit


Du hast mindestens 3 Jahre Berufserfahrung in einem dynamischen Umfeld wie einem Startup, Venture Capital, Unternehmensberatung oder der Strategieabteilung eines Unternehmens
Starke unternehmerische Denkweise und nachweisbare Erfahrung im Aufbau von Unternehmen oder Business Units
Exzellente analytische Fähigkeiten und eine Hands-on-Mentalität
Hohe Motivation, Verantwortung zu übernehmen und in einem schnelllebigen Umfeld zu arbeiten
Hervorragende Kommunikations- und Teamfähigkeit
Fließende Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse sowie sehr gute Kenntnisse in Excel und PowerPoint


Das Bekommst Du Bei Uns


Die einzigartige Möglichkeit, mit aufstrebenden Startups und erfahrenen Gründern zusammenzuarbeiten und einen direkten Einfluss auf das Wachstum der Unternehmen zu nehmen
Flache Hierarchien und eine enge Zusammenarbeit mit dem Management unserer Portfoliofirmen und des Family Office
Vielfältige Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten in einem dynamischen und unternehmerischen Umfeld
Eine inspirierende Arbeitsatmosphäre in einer attraktiven Bürolage am Kurfürstendamm


Jetzt bewerben

Title: Staff Data Analyst, Marketing Analytics
Description:
Change the way the world travels

Join the GetYourGuide journey to connect people with unforgettable travel experiences around the world. Millions look to us for unique activities they can trust, and it’s all powered by our commitment to make every single journey extraordinary - including yours.

Ready to unlock your potential with a community of fellow explorers? Find your next role at our Berlin HQ or one of our local offices around the globe, from New York to Bangkok. Head to getyourguide.careers to take the first step.

Team mission

The Analytics department’s mission is to enable the Marketing organisation to take action based on data. We work on a variety of problems and datasets as members of cross-functional mission teams. We take ownership of the entire analytics funnel, from exploration through recommendations to impact measurement, and take pride in the insights we generate.

This specific position is within our Marketing Analytics team whose objective is to help our marketing scale our investments towards the most incremental and loyal customers. This is a very strategic position within the team as the Analyst will look at solving cross-channel problems in order to accelerate our growth. This means for example addressing the best strategy to grow our display and mid-funnel spend and understanding the behaviour of our repeat audiences.

Your mission


Develop quantitative analysis and statistical models to evaluate and steer marketing decisions
Propose and defend strategic recommendations to our top marketing leads
Setup and analyse marketing experiments to drive strategic decision making
Explore large datasets, give meaning to data and numbers, identify opportunities and issues, and present findings to stakeholders
Maintain and improve our marketing measurement tools (Attribution, experimentation framework, Customer lifetime value…)
Serve as a liaison between the marketing teams and the data engineering team
Mentor others in the skills needed for this role


Your toolkit


8+ years of relevant experience interpreting data in an analytics, data science or business intelligence role
Strong knowledge of SQL and Python for analysis (eg, pandas, scikit-learn, pyspark)
Ability to understand user behavior and meaning behind the numbers and a track record in sharing insights to business stakeholders
Prior exposure to digital and performance marketing or SEO, especially data-driven platforms such as Google Ads and Meta.
Experience with data visualization and reporting tools (e.g. Looker, Jupyter Notebooks, Databricks)
Desire to work in an international environment, with minimal direction and with highly engaged individuals
Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English


Extras that give you an edge


A track record in solving marketing and growth challenges and influencing decisions/driving business results
Experience in understanding and modelling marketing journeys
Experience with big data tools (e.g. Spark, Hive) is a plus


How We’ll Make Your Career Journey Extraordinary


Annual personal growth budget and mentorship programs for continuous learning and development
Work from anywhere in the world for 30 days per year
A hybrid working approach with three days of in office collaboration (Mon, Tue, Thur) and two days of optional at home focus time.
Opportunities to collaborate and socialize with team members through quarterly team events and yearly company-wide events
Monthly transportation and fitness budget
Discounts for you, your friends, and family on GetYourGuide activities
Language reimbursement program
Health and wellness benefits


And more…

How To Apply

Submit your CV/resume in English using the form below. For tips and insights into our hiring process and culture, check out ‘how we hire’ and ‘life at GetYourGuide’. If you have any further questions, please don’t hesitate to get in touch at jobs@getyourguide.com.

We’re an equal opportunities employer

Our commitment is that every qualified person will be evaluated according to their skills regardless of age, gender identity, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability status, or religion. Please refrain from including your picture and age with your application.

  • Annual personal growth budget and mentorship programs for continuous learning and development
  • Work from anywhere in the world for 30 days per year
  • A hybrid working approach with three days of in office collaboration (Mon, Tue, Thur) and two days of optional at home focus time.
  • Opportunities to collaborate and socialize with team members through quarterly team events and yearly company-wide events
  • Monthly transportation and fitness budget
  • Discounts for you, your friends, and family on GetYourGuide activities
  • Language reimbursement program
  • Health and wellness benefits

And more…

How To Apply

Submit your CV/resume in English using the form below. For tips and insights into our hiring process and culture, check out ‘how we hire’ and ‘life at GetYourGuide’. If you have any further questions, please don’t hesitate to get in touch at jobs@getyourguide.com.

We’re an equal opportunities employer

Our commitment is that every qualified person will be evaluated according to their skills regardless of age, gender identity, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability status, or religion. Please refrain from including your picture and age with your application.

Title: Insights Analyst
Description:
The PureGym Way

The PureGym Group is a global gym business with a community of more than 700 gyms and over 2 million members. At PureGym, everything we do comes back to one simple idea: helping you feel good.

We're proud of our people and have a strong focus on internal progression. Championing diversity, we are committed to providing an excellent employee experience and workplace culture. As such, we are a Disability Confident Committed employer, and offer interviews to candidates who meet the essential criteria for a role, and opt-in to the scheme on their application form.

Our gyms are friendly, supportive, and judgement-free spaces where everybody can come in, work out and leave Feeling PureGym Good. We are proud to be certified by Top Employers Institute. See our careers page for full benefits.




We offer

Free nationwide gym membership for you + 1
Hybrid working
A truly flexible working culture
Personal private healthcare, including digital GP
Life insurance x4
Company pension contribution
25 days annual leave, plus 1 personal day
Option to purchase additional holiday (up to 5 days)
Great learning & development resources
Enhanced maternity pay, paternity and adoption leave




Location: Hybrid- London (3 days in the office)

Type: Full Time

Contract type: Permanent

Application: Closing date 22nd May 2026

We are a value business, focused on making gyms and fitness accessible to as many people as possible. Data is at the heart of how we run our business, starting from where to open our gyms, through what we offer within them, to how we engage with past, current, and future members. Combining the data from our 2.5+ million members with data about locations, operations, and performance allows us to unlock industry leading insights and drive a better member experience and commercial performance.

As an Insights Analyst you will be at the heart of solving some of the hardest data challenges in the business, turning data into insights and business value through a combination of in-depth analysis and reporting creation. You will be leveraging one of the biggest fitness data assets in the world, and working with state-of-the-art technologies, to help determine what drives member behaviour and commercial outcomes across all our operating geographies.




The Role

As a small, agile team, Insights works closely with its stakeholders, putting data at the heart of decision making across the business. While reporting to the Insights Manager, in this role you get to work closely with stakeholders at all levels across the business. You will also work in close collaboration with the wider Insights & Analytics functions, which provides ample opportunity to learn from a group of talented and experienced Data Scientists and Data Engineers.

In this role, you will have the opportunity to:

Work on business-critical analytics projects and reporting, identifying outcomes and communicating findings and recommendations to stakeholders across the business - Commercial, Finance, Operational and Marketing teams, in addition to Data Science and Data Engineering.
Build and maintain the central data product serving KPIs and insights to the entire organisation.
Work with Azure Databricks, PowerBI and dbt technology, leveraging modern cloud-native technologies and data lakehouse architecture.
Drive continuous improvement to how we enable data driven decision making in PureGym.




The Person

We would expect some or all of the following:

Experience in data analytics / insights
Proficient with SQL, Power BI, Excel and PowerPoint
Additionally, experience with dbt would be an advantage
A drive to turn insights into compelling stories for stakeholders to understand, for them to make more effective, data-led decisions
Strong commercial awareness with an interest in B2C

We are looking for an ambitious individual with a passion for leveraging analytics to drive business outcomes. The following core attributes are essential:

Excellent problem-solving: someone who enjoys applying their mind to many and varied business problems and be a driving force behind solving them
Innovative and curious: constantly seek to learn and find new and better ways of doing things; not just solving problems but seeking them out; always interested to find new and better methods and technologies
Biased towards action: take the initiative and get things done under their own steam and in collaboration with others
Collaborative: driven to engage with colleagues from across the business and support and enable your team members
A great communicator: able to translate complex concepts and analyses into digestible recommendations that can be easily interpreted and acted upon




PureGym is proud to be an equal opportunities employer. Our company mantra is ‘Everybody Welcome’ and we are dedicated to promoting a diverse and inclusive place to work. From a hiring standpoint, we welcome applicants from all backgrounds and are committed to ensuring that our PureGym colleagues reflect the diversity of the nation as well as our millions of gym members we serve.




Please note: Qualifications and Skills represent the essential criteria for the role, which need to be met to be offered an interview under the Disability Confident Scheme. Volume of eligible applications may impact everyone being able to be offered an interview.

Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis, and the advert may be withdrawn at any time. Early application is encouraged.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Meet the Team

Cisco ThousandEyes is a Digital Assurance platform that empowers organizations to deliver flawless digital experiences across every network – even the ones they don’t own. Powered by AI and an unmatched set of cloud, internet and enterprise network telemetry data, ThousandEyes enables IT teams to proactively detect, diagnose, and remediate issues – before they impact end- user experiences.

ThousandEyes is deeply integrated across the entire Cisco technology portfolio and beyond, helping customers deploy at scale while also delivering AI-powered assurance insights within Cisco’s leading Networking, Security, Collaboration, and Observability portfolios.

Your Impact

You will employ analytical techniques to solve key questions that make the business of Cisco ThousandEyes successful. You will be primarily responsibly to produce statistical reports that covers analyses reporting internet performance for Government customers.


Lead key, cross-functional analytical projects, identifying and bringing together stakeholders/ partners, developing joint analytical approaches, and completing the project.
Collaborate with internal and external partners, including Data Scientists within the company and across clients, on methodology for reporting that performance of ISPs in specific geographies and to explain trends and patterns in the data.
Develop and maintains data pipelines and dashboards to monitor and track trends and changes in the customer data.
Use data to find opportunities and patterns that Government customers may be interested in.
Display deep data wrangling techniques, strong visualization skills to depict/ present narratives that identify growth opportunities.


Minimum Qualifications


Strong R for production reporting pipelines: tidyverse, multi-file project navigation, debugging across pipeline stages, and package/version management with renv.
SQL for analytical querying against BigQuery and MariaDB via bigrquery, DBI, and RMariaDB.
Literate programming and reporting: R Markdown and Quarto rendering to Word, chart/table formatting with ggplot2/flextable/officedown, and reproducible quarterly output.
Statistical judgment: interpreting confidence intervals, weighted means, trimmed means, and sample size limitations - knowing when a result is technically accurate but misleading.
Report writing for a regulatory audience: clear, detailed, defensible prose with consistent terminology, informative tone, and editorial judgment that AI drafting alone can't replace.
Attention to detail in published outputs: catching mislabelled figures, wrong baselines, numbers that don't sum, and chart axes that obscure trends.
Data management across multiple systems: BigQuery, GCS, SharePoint/OneDrive, and local R sessions with no automated orchestration -- manual, script-by-script execution requiring care and rigor.
Comfortable using AI coding tools (Cursor, Copilot, etc.) as a force-multiplier for pipeline maintenance, debugging, drafting, and routine code changes.


Preferred Qualifications


Experience with broadband measurement, telecom/ISP data, or network performance concepts.
Spatial data basics in R.
Awareness of PII and data confidentiality constraints.
Shiny for small internal tools.


Why Cisco?

At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.

Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere.

We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.
